div.p: The United Nations Security Council met on November 6 from 3 to 6:10 p. m.; for the record, see U.N. document S/PV.518. At the beginning of the meeting, the United States Representative read to the Council the text of General MacArthur’s special report of November 5 (S/1884; see telegram 476, November 5, 5 p. m., to New York, page 1046) and indicated that he would like a meeting of the Council at the earliest possible convenience to consider the subject. Before adjourning, the Council set the time of the requested meeting at 10:30 a. m. on Wednesday, November 8.
